notes:
Release v0.2.2

- Fix 15 bugs: window width, clipboard validation, WebP→PNG, tag dedup, theme cache, backoff, date format, OCR timeout, tray icon panic
- Extract prompts.ts, validate.ts with runtime analysis result checking
- Split Home.tsx: CollectionContextMenu, 3 hooks (shortcuts/input/crop)
- Simplify export UI to single button, copy copies full report
- Auto-dismiss undo banner after 5 seconds
- Move OCR to dedicated sidebar page with Scan icon
- Rename app from Img2Prompt to AI Vision
